title: St. Benedict's Church, Hong Kong

infobox.value: 7 Kong Pui Street, [Sha Tin](/wiki/Sha_Tin "Sha Tin"), [New Territories](/wiki/New_Territories "New Territories")
Xavier Demolliens [MEP](/wiki/Paris_Foreign_Missions_Society "Paris Foreign Missions Society") Joseph Huang Li Wei [SVD](/wiki/Society_of_the_Divine_Word "Society of the Divine Word")
Rev. Fr. Issac Noh Hyun Chul | Korean Foreign Missions Society
Rev. Fr. Xavier Demolliens | [Paris Foreign Missions Society](/wiki/Paris_Foreign_Missions_Society "Paris Foreign Missions Society")
Rev. Fr. Edward Yu | [Diocese of Hong Kong](/wiki/Diocese_of_Hong_Kong "Diocese of Hong Kong")

Rev. Deacon David Choi Wai San | [Diocese of Hong Kong](/wiki/Diocese_of_Hong_Kong "Diocese of Hong Kong")

([Chinese](/wiki/Chinese_language "Chinese language"): 聖本篤堂) is a [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Catholic_Church "Catholic Church") church located in [Sha Tin](/wiki/Sha_Tin "Sha Tin"), [New Territories](/wiki/New_Territories "New Territories"), [Hong Kong](/wiki/Hong_Kong "Hong Kong").
["English Community"](https://stbenedict.catholic.org.hk/english.html). *聖本篤堂 Church of St Benedict*.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Catholic church in Hong Kong

For other uses, see [St. Benedict's Church](/wiki/St._Benedict%27s_Church_(disambiguation) "St. Benedict's Church (disambiguation)").

Church in New Territories, Hong Kong

**St. Benedict's Church** ([Chinese](/wiki/Chinese_language "Chinese language"): 聖本篤堂) is a [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Catholic_Church "Catholic Church") church located in [Sha Tin](/wiki/Sha_Tin "Sha Tin"), [New Territories](/wiki/New_Territories "New Territories"), [Hong Kong](/wiki/Hong_Kong "Hong Kong").

The church is dedicated to [St. Benedict of Nursia](/wiki/Benedict_of_Nursia "Benedict of Nursia"), and the church was consecrated on 20 February 1993.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=St._Benedict%27s_Church,_Hong_Kong&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

On 29 August 1987, Cardinal [John Baptist Wu](/wiki/John_Baptist_Wu "John Baptist Wu"), Bishop of Hong Kong, announced the sub-division of the Sha Tin area into 3 parishes. In the same year, on 6 September 1987, the first Holy Mass was celebrated in the covered playground of the Immaculate Heart of Mary College inside [Jat Min Chuen](/wiki/Jat_Min_Chuen "Jat Min Chuen"), with around 300 parishioners.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

The ground breaking ceremony of the church was officiated by Rev. Gabriel Lam, Vicar General of Hong Kong, after 2 years, the church was consecrated on 20 February 1993 by Cardinal John Baptist Wu, together with Archbishop [Dominic Tang](/wiki/Dominic_Tang "Dominic Tang") of [Guangzhou](/wiki/Archdiocese_of_Guangzhou "Archdiocese of Guangzhou"), a visiting Archbishop from South Africa, and 80 other concelebrating priests.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

In the same time, Cardinal Wu appoints Rev. John F. Ahearn, Priest of the [Maryknoll Society](/wiki/Maryknoll_Society "Maryknoll Society"), as the first Parish Priest of St. Benedict's Church.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

| Resident Priest | Rev. Fr. Edward Yu | [Diocese of Hong Kong](/wiki/Diocese_of_Hong_Kong "Diocese of Hong Kong") |
